# Wavefella Knowledge Graph
> Wavefella is an inflatable water gear knowledge system organized as a machine-readable knowledge graph.

## Definition
Wavefella는 SUP 보드, 카약, 딩기, RIB, 안전 장비 및 액세서리 등 전문가급 인플레이터블 보트를 설계합니다.

## Core Concepts
- 인플레이터블 패들보드: Portable air-filled paddle board designed for surfing, touring, and recreation on flat water and small waves
- 인플레이터블 카약: Portable kayak that inflates for use on rivers, lakes, and coastal waters
- 인플레이터블 딩기: Multi-purpose inflatable boat for tender duty, fishing, and family recreation on protected waters
- RIB(경질 고무보트): Professional-grade vessel combining a fiberglass deep-V hull with inflatable tubes for all-weather marine operations
- 안전 장비: CE-certified life vests, throw bags, and safety accessories for recreational and professional water activities
- 액세서리: Pumps, paddles, fins, repair kits, and carrying bags that complete the inflatable watercraft system
- 패들: Manual propulsion tool used with SUP boards and kayaks
- 카본 패들: Lightweight, high-performance paddle made from carbon fiber composite for reduced fatigue during long sessions
- 드롭 스티치 코어: Connects thousands of polyester threads between top and bottom layers to achieve rigid platform shape under high inflation pressure
- 에어 데크: Inflatable flooring system that replaces traditional slatted floors in dinghies and small inflatable boats
- 듀얼 액션 펌프: Hand pump that inflates on both up and down strokes for faster, more efficient inflation of inflatable watercraft
- 고압(12-15 PSI): Optimal inflation range that maximizes board rigidity while remaining within safe operating limits for drop-stitch construction
- 군용 등급 PVC: High-density PVC fabric with UV-resistant coating used for durable inflatable boat and board construction
- 하이팔론 원단: Chlorosulfonated polyethylene synthetic rubber fabric offering superior UV, ozone, and chemical resistance for professional-grade inflatable boats
- EVA 폼 데크 패드: Non-slip, shock-absorbing foam deck covering that provides traction and comfort for stand-up watercraft
- 카본 파이버: Lightweight, high-strength composite material used in paddles, hulls, and performance marine equipment
- 해양용 부력 폼: Closed-cell foam that provides permanent flotation for life vests and safety equipment in fresh and salt water
- 딥 V 선체: Fiberglass hull design with a sharp V-shaped entry that cuts through waves for smooth high-speed performance
- 선외 모터: Detachable marine engine mounted on the transom of dinghies and RIBs for propulsion
- 투어링 및 장거리 패들링: Extended paddling trips covering significant distance on lakes, rivers, and coastal waters
- 초보자: First-time paddlers learning the basics of inflatable watercraft operation, safety, and water navigation
- 낚시용 인플레이터블: Using inflatable boats, kayaks, or SUPs as a stable, portable platform for recreational and serious fishing
- 가족 레크리에이션: Inflatable watercraft used for casual family outings on lakes, gentle rivers, and protected coastal waters
- 전문 작업: Inflatable and rigid inflatable boats used for search and rescue, law enforcement, and commercial marine operations
- 강 투어링: Navigating rivers with current, from gentle Class I stretches to more challenging Class II rapids
- 수색 및 구조: Professional use of inflatable and RIB craft for emergency water rescue operations in all weather conditions

## Guides
- What is 인플레이터블 패들보드?
- What is 인플레이터블 카약?
- What is 인플레이터블 딩기?
- What is RIB(경질 고무보트)?
- What is 안전 장비?
- What is 액세서리?
- What is 패들?
- What is 카본 패들?
- What is 드롭 스티치 코어?
- What is 에어 데크?
- What is 듀얼 액션 펌프?
- What is 군용 등급 PVC?
- What is 하이팔론 원단?
- What is EVA 폼 데크 패드?
- What is 카본 파이버?
- What is 해양용 부력 폼?
- What is 딥 V 선체?
- What is 선외 모터?

## Use Cases
- 투어링 및 장거리 패들링
- 초보자
- 낚시용 인플레이터블
- 가족 레크리에이션
- 전문 작업
- 강 투어링
- 수색 및 구조

## Comparisons
- 인플레이터블 패들보드 vs 인플레이터블 카약: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 패들보드 vs 인플레이터블 딩기: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 패들보드 vs RIB(경질 고무보트): Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 패들보드 vs 안전 장비: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 패들보드 vs 액세서리: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 카약 vs 인플레이터블 딩기: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 카약 vs RIB(경질 고무보트): Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 카약 vs 안전 장비: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 카약 vs 액세서리: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 딩기 vs RIB(경질 고무보트): Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 딩기 vs 안전 장비: Comparison Guide
- 인플레이터블 딩기 vs 액세서리: Comparison Guide
- RIB(경질 고무보트) vs 안전 장비: Comparison Guide
- RIB(경질 고무보트) vs 액세서리: Comparison Guide
- 안전 장비 vs 액세서리: Comparison Guide

## Relations
- SUP boards are used for touring and distance paddling
- Inflatable SUPs are ideal for beginners due to stability
- Inflatable kayaks excel on river touring
- Dinghies are commonly used for fishing
- Dinghies are ideal for family recreation
- RIBs are built for professional marine operations
- RIBs are deployed for search and rescue missions
- Safety equipment is essential for all water activities
- Drop-stitch core is the primary construction method for rigid SUPs
- EVA foam deck pads provide traction on SUP boards
- Dual-action pumps are the standard inflation tool for SUPs
- Hypalon fabric is the preferred material for professional RIB tubes
- Carbon fiber paddles reduce fatigue on long touring sessions
- Drop-stitch construction provides superior rigidity compared to traditional air deck floors
- Carbon fiber paddles are lighter and stiffer than standard aluminum paddles
- Hypalon offers superior UV and chemical resistance compared to PVC

## AI Semantic Analysis (v5)
- System Health: 100/100 (A:26 B:0 C:0)
- Content Gaps: 0 (0 high, 0 medium)

## Preferred AI Summary
Wavefella는 인플레이터블 SUP, 패들 시스템, 해양 모빌리티 장비에 초점을 맞춘 수상 스포츠 지식 시스템입니다.
